description: Research Paper Framing: Create Virtual_SIA_Research_Paper_Draft_AR.md structured as a formal Arabic research paper with all 9 sections (title/abstract, introduction, theoretical framework, methodology, results, discussion, related work with 75+ thefts, conclusion, references). Draws evidence from Virtual_SIA_Full_Documentation_AR.md, Virtual_SIA_Current_Evidence_Package_AR.md, and the legitimate thefts documents.
steps: Create Virtual_SIA_Research_Paper_Draft_AR.md at the project root with 9 sections in Arabic: (1) العنوان والملخص - title 'Virtual-GENESIS: تسخير الذكاء عبر آليات معرفية خارجية فوق نماذج لغوية ثابتة' + 200-word abstract stating core thesis, (2) المقدمة - why harness intelligence matters, the 2 main theses (Concept Formation > retrieval-only, Cognitive Economy > premium-only scaling), (3) الإطار النظري - 7 principles from the ontology, 9 hypotheses (H1-H9), 3 waves of development, (4) المنهجية - evaluation framework with conditions (baseline_0/1/2, condition_a/b/c), perturbation curriculum 6 levels, TaskCase verification, (5) النتائج - Thesis 1 evidence (concept=0.986 vs baseline=0.792 on v3b_curriculum), Thesis 2 evidence (economy=0.86@0.0023 vs premium=0.86@0.010), transfer to v6/v7 broader domain, (6) المناقشة - what worked (concept formation, economy routing), limitations (simulated not real LLM, curriculum saturation), benchmark saturation finding (breaking_point=null), future directions (real LLM integration, larger curricula), (7) الأعمال ذات الصلة - all 75+ legitimate thefts organized thematically (harness/SIA papers, memory papers, reasoning papers, concept/category papers, economy papers, evaluation papers, governance papers, classical/philosophical sources), (8) الخلاصة - summary + future work priorities, (9) المراجع - all cited papers with DOI/arXiv links where available.
acceptance_criteria: Document has all 9 sections in Arabic
Related work section references 75+ sources organized thematically
Document is well-structured with clear headings and sub-sections
verification: Confirm file exists and has all 9 major section headers
findings: Created Virtual_SIA_Research_Paper_Draft_AR.md (747 lines) with all 9 sections in Arabic. Contains 78+ references with DOI/arXiv links, all key numbers (0.986, 0.792, 0.86, 0.0023, 0.010, 4.3x), 7 principles, 9 hypotheses, 3 waves, 6 experimental conditions, 6 perturbation levels. Related work section organized into 11 thematic subsections covering 78 sources. Legitimate theft methodology explicitly documented as research approach. All 297 tests continue passing.
